sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness, particularly when standing. He denies any chest pain, shortness of breath, or palpitations. He also states he has been diagnosed with diabetes.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 110/70 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable, with no focal deficits.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's primary problem is diabetes, complicated by orthostatic dizziness. A further evaluation is needed to determine the etiology of the dizziness.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order an A1C test. Start clindamycin 300mg twice daily. Schedule follow-up in one week to assess response to treatment and adjust as needed.
